rssFeedUrl.title: RSS Feed URL
rssFeedUrl.description: URL of the RSS feed to scrape articles from

lumaEventUrls.title: Lu.ma Event URLs
lumaEventUrls.description: Lu.ma city page URLs. The slug (e.g. 'austin' from lu.ma/austin) is mapped to a Discover API place ID to fetch events.

meetupCities.title: Meetup Cities
meetupCities.description: Cities to search for Meetup events

meetupKeywords.title: Meetup Keywords
meetupKeywords.description: Comma-separated keywords to search Meetup events. Each keyword runs a separate search per city; results are deduplicated by event URL.

meetupMaxResultsPerCity.title: Meetup Max Results Per City
meetupMaxResultsPerCity.description: Maximum number of Meetup events to retrieve per city, per keyword

maxArticles.title: Max Articles
maxArticles.description: Maximum number of articles to scrape (applies to RSS + additional URLs combined)

useProxies.title: Use Proxies
useProxies.description: Use proxies for web scraping (Lu.ma uses a direct API and does not need proxies)
